name: Potatoes Gourmet
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in their skins; allow to cool.
2. Peel the potatoes and shred them on a coarse grater.
3. In a saucepan, combine the cheese and 3 tablespoons of margarine. Heat gently and stir until the cheese is almost melted.
4. Remove from heat and blend in the sour cream, chopped onions, salt, and pepper.
5. Fold in the shredded potatoes into the mixture.
6. Transfer the mixture to a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
7. Dot with an additional tablespoon of margarine.
8. Cover and bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for about 25 minutes.
